title: Influence of Brave Raideen
wikitext:
[]: Influence of Brave Raideen             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Jul 07, 2014 11:23 am Brave Raideen is commonly mentioned as a direct influence on RahXephon - specifically by the way that the pilot (Akira/Ayato) enters the titular beast/mecha (Raideen/RahXephon), simply being absorbed into the chest. However, I note also that one of the characters in Brave Raideen is called Rei Asuka . Well, well, what a coincidence! I wonder if that meant anything. Then I realised that another of the characters is called - wait for it - Mari . Hmm. Is this perhaps well-known and never mentioned? Or perhaps it is inconsequential anyway...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 07, 2014 11:35 am We have Anno's conscious notes on where the character names came from -- e.g. Ayanami is named for Sailor Mars, as part of Anno's attempt to get Ikuhara on board with the project. That there might be subconscious, secondary, associations pretty much goes without saying.

However, I note also that one of the characters in Brave Raideen is called Rei Asuka . Well, well, what a coincidence!
